EmailTemplate.name: ARRH - Client requirements
EmailTemplate.subject: More info about {!TR1__Job__c.Name}
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
YOUR NEXT ADVENTURE AWAITS.
Hi {!Contact.FirstName},
we are excited to tell you more about the {!TR1__Job__c.Name} contract.
If you want to proceed with your application, please reply to this email and we will present your profile to {!TR1__Job__c.TR1__Account_Name__c}.
Contract details:
Start date: {!TR1__Job__c.TR1__Estimated_Start_Date__c} End date: {!TR1__Job__c.TR1__Estimated_End_Date__c} Client: {!TR1__Job__c.TR1__Account_Name__c} Destination: {!TR1__Job__c.Site_Name__c}
A bit about the assignment...
Skills required: {!TR1__Job__c.TR1__Skills__c}
[Skill A] [Skill B] [Skill C]
Certificates required:
[Certificate A] [Certificate B] [Certificate C]
Travel assistance: Y/N Accomodation provided: Y/N
To proceed your application for this contract, please reply to this email and provide your travel and accomodation preferences by filling out this form:
TRAVEL AND ACCOMODATION PREFERENCES
If you have any questions at all you can always call us on 07 4998 5550.
Kind regards, Your team at Alliance Rural & Remote Health
